name: pideck
description: PiDeck — Windows-first desktop GUI for Pi Coding Agent

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pideck/protocol run build && pnpm --filter @pideck/pi-host run build && pnpm --filter @pideck/desktop run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @pideck/protocol run build && pnpm --filter @pideck/protocol run typecheck && pnpm --filter @pideck/pi-host run typecheck && pnpm --filter @pideck/desktop run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @pideck/protocol run build && pnpm -r --filter @pideck/protocol --filter @pideck/pi-host --filter @pideck/desktop run test
scripts.verify:quick: pnpm verify:docs && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.verify:p0: pnpm verify:quick && pnpm build && pnpm test:rust
